entries.content: pronoun ① (in direct and indirect questions) 什么 shénme▸ what is happening? 出什么事了？
entries.label: A
entries.name: pronoun

entries.content: determiner ① (which) 哪个 nǎge▸ what time is it? 现在几点钟？
entries.label: B
entries.name: determiner

entries.content: adverb ① (how much) 多少 duōshao▸ what does it matter? 那有什么关系？
entries.label: C
entries.name: adverb

entries.content: what about phrase ① (in question) …怎么样 … zěnmeyàng▸ what about the children? 孩子们怎么样？
entries.label: D
entries.name: what about

entries.content: what if phrase ① (what will happen?) 要是…会怎么样 yàoshi… huì zěnmeyàng
entries.label: E
entries.name: what if
